extended_help:
Open the Nova Kitchen to cook food from ingredients you've gathered.

**Usage:**
• `/cook` — Browse all recipes you can make
• `/cook tier:basic` — Filter by tier (basic, mid, late, end, dungeon)
• `/cook recipe:mushroom_soup` — Cook instantly (autocomplete supported)

**Mechanics:**
• Costs {{cost}} stamina per cook (no cooldown)
• Requires ingredients from /explore, /hunt, or /fish
• Food restores HP and may grant temporary buffs (ATK, DEF, Regen)
• Buffs do not stack — new buff replaces old one

**Tiers:**
• Basic (≤35 HP) — early game
• Mid (36–70 HP)
• Late (71–150 HP)
• End (>150 HP)
• Dungeon — special dungeon drops

Tip: Cook before /hunt or /dungeon for the buff.
title: 🍳 Nova Kitchen
